title: Laptop stuck in BitLocker recovery loop

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Laptop boots into BitLocker recovery and will not pass
servicenow_seed.description: User's laptop boots straight to a BitLocker recovery key prompt and loops back after every entry attempt. User does not have a recovery key.

correct_steps: Verify caller and capture asset tag
Look up the BitLocker recovery key in Intune / Azure AD
If a key is found, walk the user through entering it once and confirm boot
If no key is on file, do NOT keep re-attempting - escalate to Desktop Support
Note any recent BIOS/TPM/firmware change that may have triggered the loop
rationale: BitLocker recovery is a one-shot procedure. Without the key, repeated attempts do nothing. If no key is on file, hand off with the asset tag.
hints: Always check the IAM portal for the recovery key first.
A recent BIOS/TPM change is a common trigger.
learning_objectives: Use IAM portal to retrieve BitLocker recovery keys
Recognize when continuing Tier 1 attempts wastes the user's time

tool_clues.intune: Device LAP-7842 last check-in 7 days ago. BitLocker recovery key: NOT on file.
